approve(address,uint256).details: Sets `account` as the approved account to manage token `id`. Requirements: - Token `id` must exist. - The caller must be the owner of the token,   or an approved operator for the token owner. Emits an {Approval} event.

balanceOf(address).details: Returns the number of tokens owned by `owner`. Requirements: - `owner` must not be the zero address.

params._addDataVerifierAddress: Address of the add/update data proof verifier
params._ecdhVerifierAddress: Address of the ECDH transfer proof verifier
params._metadataAddress: Address of the metadata rendering contract

getApproved(uint256).details: Returns the account approved to manage token `id`. Requirements: - Token `id` must exist.

getFlag(uint256).details: True if encrypted with owner's keypair, false if encrypted via ECDH

returns._0: Timestamp when the token was last encrypted

isApprovedForAll(address,address).details: Returns whether `operator` is approved to manage the tokens of `owner`.

mint(uint256[2],uint256[2][2],uint256[2].details: Requires payment of mint price and valid ZK proof of encryption

params._pubSignals: Public signals: [timestamp, field1, field2, field3, field4]
params.to: Address to receive the minted token

ownerOf(uint256).details: Returns the owner of token `id`. Requirements: - Token `id` must exist.

reCipher(uint256[2],uint256[2][2],uint25.details: Only callable by token owner, updates encrypted fields with new values

params._pubSignals: Public signals: [timestamp, field1, field2, field3, field4]

registerPublicKey(uint256,uint256).details: Public key must be a valid point on the Baby Jubjub curve

returnTokenIdsOfOwner(uint256,uint256,ad.details: More gas efficient than standard enumerable extension

returns._0: Array of token IDs owned by the address

safeTransferFrom(address,address,uint256.details: Transfers token `id` from `from` to `to`. Requirements: - Token `id` must exist. - `from` must be the owner of the token. - `to` cannot be the zero address. - The caller must be the owner of the token, or be approved to manage the token. - If `to` refers to a smart contract, it must implement   {IERC721Receiver-onERC721Received}, which is called upon a safe transfer. Emits a {Transfer} event.

setApprovalForAll(address,bool).details: Sets whether `operator` is approved to manage the tokens of the caller. Emits an {ApprovalForAll} event.

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See: https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165 This function call must use less than 30000 gas.

tokenURI(uint256).details: Calls the metadata contract to generate dynamic metadata including encrypted fields

returns._0: Base64 encoded data URI containing token metadata

transferFrom(address,address,uint256).details: Always reverts, forcing use of verifiedTransferFrom

verifiedTransferFrom(address,address,uin.details: Verifies proof, re-encrypts data for recipient, then transfers

params._pubSignals: Public signals: [recipientPubKeyX, recipientPubKeyY, timestamp, newField1-4, oldField1-4, senderPubKeyX, senderPubKeyY]

artist().notice: Artist wallet address receiving mint proceeds

constructor.notice: Initializes the contract with verifier and metadata addresses

getEncryptedNote(uint256).notice: Gets all encrypted data and metadata for a token

getFlag(uint256).notice: Gets the encryption method flag for a token

getTimestamp(uint256).notice: Gets the encryption timestamp for a token

getTimestampAndFlag(uint256).notice: Gets both timestamp and flag for a token

mapLastOwner(uint256).notice: Maps token IDs to the previous owner's address

metadata().notice: Address of the metadata rendering contract

mint(uint256[2],uint256[2][2],uint256[2].notice: Mints a new NFT with encrypted data

reCipher(uint256[2],uint256[2][2],uint25.notice: Re-encrypts the data of an owned token with a new cipher

registerPublicKey(uint256,uint256).notice: Registers a user's public encryption key

returnTokenIdsOfOwner(uint256,uint256,ad.notice: Returns all token IDs owned by an address in a given range

tokenIdToNote(uint256).notice: Maps token IDs to their encrypted data

tokenURI(uint256).notice: Returns the metadata URI for a token

transferFrom(address,address,uint256).notice: Disabled - prevents direct transfers without re-encryption

userPublicKeys(address,uint256).notice: Maps user addresses to their public encryption keys

verifiedTransferFrom(address,address,uin.notice: Transfers token with ZK-verified re-encryption to recipient
